name: Zucchini Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix cocoa, flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt together in a bowl. Set aside.
3. Beat margarine and sugar together until smooth.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla, zucchini, and nuts.
6. Blend tofu with vinegar.
7. Stir a bit of the dry ingredients into the zucchini mixture, followed by a bit of the zucchini puree. Alternate mixing, a little at a time, until it's all together.
8. Pour into a greased and floured (or nonstick) 10-inch loaf pan or a 9x13-inch square pan. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing.
